settings.text: Download Tracki App Scan the QR code or type in your browser tracki.com/ios for IOS or tracki.com/android for android.
Create an Account Open the app and tap “Lets Start!”. Enter your email, name, country, and password. Tap “Continue”.

Activate your Device Add your tracker ID and IMEI, you can find it on the box or on the side of the tracker. Choose and pay for your subscription. Enter your pet’s name, info & picture. (Subscription pays for your data plan to send live location data to our servers via the cellular network, the costs of maintaining our servers, infrastructure and tech support).

settings.heading: Getting started
settings.additional_text: * FYI: GPS Trackers need to be in a location that can properly receive satellite signals. Satellite signal may be obstructed by dense trees, tall buildings, or going indoors. In such cases, your Tracki will make use of nearby Wi-Fi routers to provide an approximate location. There are a few battery saving modes, please refer to the online manual or in app instructions.

settings.heading: General information
settings.Text:
These operating instructions are for the Tracki Pro 4G GPS tracker, which will simply be referred to as ‘tracker’ in the following. They contain important information regarding set-up and operation. Before using the tracker, please read the operating instructions carefully. This particularly applies to the safety notes. Failure to adhere to these operating instructions may result in severe injury or damage to the tracker.

The operating instructions are based on the standards and rules in force in the European Union. When abroad, you must also observe country-specific guideless and laws. keep the operating instructions for future use. If you pass the tracker on to third parties, please be absolute sure, to include these operating instructions.

settings.initial_steup_text:
When you unpack the tracker for the first time, the battery is empty. Charge it as follows:

  1. Connect the charging plug of the charging cable to the tracker with the Type C.
  2.  Connect the other end of the charging cable to the USB power adaptor and then to the power socket. Alternatively you can also connect the charging cable to a computer.
  3. Charge the tracker for 6 hours.
  4. The red light will blink whilst charging. When the tracker is fully charged, the light will turn solid red.
settings.tracker_on_text:
1. Take the tracker outside so that it is in the open air.
  2. Verify tracker is ON by pressing and hold the ON/OFF button. Red light will blink.
  3. Place the tracker down and leave it for at least 15 minutes. This allows the tracker to perform its initial GPS positioning, which is required for the device to function correctly.
settings.tracker_on_heading: Once completed, the tracker will be ready for use and can be activated.
settings.tracker_on_note: Please note: this procedure is only required the very first time the tracker is turned on.
settings.tracker_web_text:
1. Open your internet browser and go to app.tracki.com
  2. Register and create your Tracki account, then wait for the activation email from Tracki, click on the confirmation link, then login.
  3. Click on “Add Tracker” and follow the on-screen instructions.
  4. Insert your tracker IMEI and Device ID, and follow the instructions to activate your service plan.
settings.tracker_app_text:
1. Download the Tracki app from the Apple Store or Google Play.
  2. Register or log into your Tracki account.
  3. Tap on "+" icon to add the device and follow the activation instructions.

settings.title: SPEED LIMIT
settings.text:
Once the user sets a speed limit for the device, they will receive an app notification whenever the tracker exceeds the designated speed. In such cases, the user will also receive the location information and a text message sent to the phone number or email address they have provided.
Please be aware that there is a cooldown period of 5 minutes between consecutive alerts.

settings.title: Zone entry \ Zone exit
settings.text:
A geofence is a virtual boundary that can be customized by the user. Whenever the tracker crosses the boundary, whether exiting or entering the defined area, the user will receive a notification within the app. Additionally, the user's specified phone number or email will receive the location information along with a text message.
Please take note that there is a cooldown period of 5 minutes between two consecutive alerts.

settings.title: SOS Key Pressed
settings.text: When the user holds down the SOS button for a minimum of 2 seconds, both the location information and a text message will be sent using all the chosen communication methods.

settings.title: LOW Battery
settings.text: When the battery percentage drops to 10%, an alert will be triggered using all the chosen communication methods. The user's specified phone number or email will receive the location details along with a text message.

settings.title: Start moving
settings.text: Once the tracker begins to move, the user will be notified within the app. Furthermore, the location information and a text message will be sent to the phone number or email address that the user has provided. Please note that there is a cooldown period of 5 minutes between two consecutive alerts.

settings.title: POWER ON/OFF
settings.text: When the device is fully charged and powered on, a notification will be triggered to inform the user about the device being turned on. Similarly, when the device is shut down, a message will be sent to the user to notify them of the shutdown.

settings.heading: Button Functions
settings.small_text:
In order to on/off the tracker long press 3 - 5 sec.
In order to check if the tracker is on press once on the on/off button - if the green light flashes the tracker is ON. If no light comes the tracker is OFF
settings.note_sub_heading_text2: Plug charging cable to the magnetic socket in the back of the device, charging can take up to 2 hours (till the green led gets solid)

settings.text: These details can be found in the side of the box and back of the device.

settings.heading: Where to place the device in your vehicle
